title: LagCheck
description: Lightweight Paper plugin to monitor server TPS, RAM, and players.
body:
LagCheck is a lightweight Paper
 plugin for Minecraft 1.20.4+.
It provides a simple /lagcheck command to quickly monitor server performance.

✨ Features

✅ Check server TPS (ticks per second)

✅ View RAM usage (used / max)

✅ See online players (current / max)

⚡ Lightweight & dependency-free

📦 Installation

Download the latest release from Modrinth
.

Drop the .jar file into your server’s plugins/ folder.

Restart your Paper server.

Use /lagcheck in-game or from console.

📜 Command

/lagcheck → Shows TPS, RAM usage, and online players.

🔑 Permissions

(Optional in future updates — currently available to all players)

📝 Changelog
v1.0.0

🎉 First public release.

Added /lagcheck command with TPS, RAM usage, and online players.

📌 Compatibility

Paper 1.20.4+
